titles.title: Let Us Feed the White Dog

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Let us feed the white dog Defeating the black dog As we fight the battle in our mind For He promised victory And in Him there's no defeat This end-time bride will overcome

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We all have a sin that easily besets us When you want to do the right Evil is so near Satan has a right to that one punch Keep that area guarded with patience run the race

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We will fight, the battle in our minds We will fight, we must prove we're not like Eve We will fight, we were born to overcome Let us put on the whole armour of God
